2604.10973.title: CFMS: A Coarse-to-Fine Multimodal Synthesis Framework for Enhanced Tabular Reasoning
2604.10973.paper_summary: Reasoning over tabular data is a crucial capability for tasks like question answering and fact verification, as it requires models to comprehend both free-form questions and semi-structured tables. However, while methods like Chain-of-Thought (CoT) introduce reasoning chains, purely symbolic methodes are inherently limited by their blindness to holistic visual patterns. To address this, we propose the Coarse-to-Fine Multimodal Synthesis framework (CFMS), a novel two-stage paradigm that hierarchically decouples high-level visual perception from granular symbolic reasoning. In the Coarse Stage, CFMS leverages the Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to perform a one-time synthesis of a multi-perspective knowledge tuple. This tuple subsequently serves as a dynamic reasoning map to guide the fine stage, where a symbolic engine executes a targeted and efficient sequence of iterative operations over the table. Extensive experiments on the WikiTQ and TabFact benchmarks demonstrate that CFMS achieves competitive accuracy. The framework exhibits particular robustness when handling large tables and when instantiated with smaller backbone models, validating its effectiveness and generalizability.
2604.10973.paper_summary_zh: 推理表格數據是一項關鍵能力，適用於問題回答和事實驗證等任務，因為這要求模型理解自由形式的問題和半結構化的表格。<lb/>然而，儘管像思維鏈（CoT）這樣的方法引入了推理鏈，但純粹的符號方法本質上受到其對整體視覺模式的盲目性的限制。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了粗到細的多模態合成框架（CFMS），這是一種新穎的兩階段範式，將高層次的視覺感知與細粒度的符號推理分層解耦。<lb/>在粗階段，CFMS 利用多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）進行一次性合成多角度知識元組。<lb/>這個元組隨後作為動態推理地圖，指導細階段，在這裡符號引擎對表格執行針對性和高效的迭代操作序列。<lb/>在 WikiTQ 和 TabFact 基準上的廣泛實驗表明，CFMS 實現了競爭力的準確性。<lb/>該框架在處理大型表格和使用較小的骨幹模型時顯示出特別的穩健性，驗證了其有效性和可泛化性。
2604.10973.author: Qixian Huang et.al.
2604.10973.authors: Qixian Huang, Hongqiang Lin, Tong Fu, Yingsen Wang, Zhenghui Fu, Qirui Wang, Yiding Sun, Dongxu Zhang
